metadata.title:
SPOKANE CLEARS DECKS today


BIGGEST LABOR FIGHT IN HISTORY

Council Commercial


Will Be Called the Next

pages.raw_text:
the plumbers are now working, but
also those on which the bosses have
already completed the work.


A large sized fight Of the labor
unions will result within short time.
There are now two organizations in
the city which have been fighting in
q way for supremacy-the building
trades council and what 10 called the
trades council. Some Of the former
have agreed with the srases council,
which is the larger organization. and
therefore the building trades-as a
counoil--will be broken mp and only
the one central body will predominant
in union affairs.


The carpenters union 10 now at
outs with both these bodies. They
refused to endorse the plumbers
strike and withdrew from the build
ing trades and in turn were requested
to withdraw from the trades council.
